scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../admin && npm install && cd ../mobile && npm install
scripts.pm2:restart: bash scripts/pm2-build.sh && PM2_CMD="${PM2_CMD:-pm2}" bash -c 'if pm2 describe aps-api >/dev/null 2>&1; then pm2 restart aps-api --update-env; else pm2 start ecosystem.config.cjs --update-env; fi && pm2 save'
